test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient. Test 1 exercises PagesService.create end-to-end with real FK enforcement. Test 2 proves database rollback atomicity via a deliberate constraint violation. Skip path covered by describe.skipIf plus console.info log. Direct-service rollback gap (WARNING) is structurally unavoidable without violating AC5.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate. cicd/docs/cicd.md, cicd/docs/local-pipeline.md, and docs/website-launch-guide.md all correctly describe the opt-in spec, invocation commands, and safe-skip behavior. Consistent DB_PORT=3306 across all docs.
